free_asset_catalog.license: DreamCo original parameter presets; local rendering engine required

guardrails: ask before every consequential external action
never claim guaranteed income, legal approval, store acceptance, or completed payment
do not sell or license sensitive personal data or minor data
make collection, training, sale, sharing, deletion, and export separate user choices
use only self-owned adult voice and likeness with active consent and visible labeling
keep professional language for business, legal, medical, financial, emergency, and government contexts
inspect open-source code before execution and preserve license obligations
limit one scheduled task to 24 hours and make long-running work cancellable

implemented_capabilities.name: Web and app-store release evidence council
Consent, portability, opt-out, and licensed-data controls
Concurrent and timed tasks up to 24 hours
Games, courses, films, music, brands, and learning media
Rights-aware artist development and original music packets
Patent, trademark, and copyright search and draft packets
Read-only repository inspection and sandbox upgrade plans
Traceable user-owned Buddy identity and personality
Shared governed execution for every cataloged bot

name: Buddy Governed Capability Platform

truth_contract.configuration_required: A provider account, secret, deployed adapter, or official review is still required.
truth_contract.implemented: Repository code and tests exist for the local or planning core.
truth_contract.roadmap_not_implemented: An evaluated product idea, not a current capability claim.
